name: ritmofit-design-system
description: RitmoFit design system — tokens.json single source of truth, web + iOS emitters, and guard scripts.

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:ios
scripts.verify: node scripts/build-tokens.mjs --check && node scripts/build-tokens-ios.mjs --check && node scripts/lint-tokens.mjs && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs
